official_title: DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2017 Amending Part 44 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts
official_title_normalized: difc courts rules of court order no 2 of 2017 amending part 44 of the rules of the difc courts
short_title: Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2017
short_title_normalized: rules of court order no 2 of 2017
citation_title_from_text: Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2017

Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2017
DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2017 Amending Part 44 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts
DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2017 Amending Part 44 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts 2017

Article 1.heading: This Order may be cited as the Rules of Court Order No. 2 of 2017. 2. Part 44 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts (RDC) on Appeals shall be amended in accordance with Schedule 1 to this Order. 3. This shall first be reflected in the online version of the RDC, and subsequently in future hardcopy publications. 4. The amended Rules will come into force on 4 April 2017
